language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the interface. Medical terms (medicine names, lab tests, diagnoses) always stay in English.

insights.title: AI Clinic Assistant
insights.subtitle: Prioritized highlights from today's data
insights.emptyHint: Alerts appear here as activity builds up.

insightMsg.longWait: A patient has been waiting {minutes} minutes — call them in to avoid a longer delay.
insightMsg.queueWaiting: {count, plural, one {# patient is waiting in the queue — consider calling the next.} other {# patients are waiting in the queue — consider calling the next.}}
insightMsg.noDoctorHours: No doctors have hours scheduled today.
insightMsg.unpaidInvoices: {count, plural, one {# unpaid invoice totaling {total} outstanding.} other {# unpaid invoices totaling {total} outstanding.}}
insightMsg.lowStock: {count, plural, one {# medicine is at or below reorder level.} other {# medicines are at or below reorder level.}}
insightMsg.expiringBatches: {count, plural, one {# stock batch is expiring within 60 days.} other {# stock batches are expiring within 60 days.}}
insightMsg.allCompleted: All of today's appointments are completed — great work!

noAppointmentsToday.title: No appointments today
noAppointmentsToday.hint: When patients are booked, they'll show up here in order.

noDoctors.title: No doctors yet
noDoctors.hint: Add doctors and set their weekly hours to see who's in today.

queueClear.title: Queue is clear
queueClear.hint: Checked-in, in-consultation and completed patients show up here through the day.

noPatients.title: No patients yet
noPatients.hint: Register your first patient to start tracking your practice.

noRevenue.title: No revenue this period
noRevenue.hint: Recorded payments will be summarized here.

inventoryHealthy.title: Inventory healthy
inventoryHealthy.hint: No low-stock or expiring items right now.

noActivity.title: No recent activity
noActivity.hint: Actions across the clinic will appear here.

noAppointments.title: No appointments yet
noAppointments.hint: Your booking trend will chart here.

noRevenueYet.title: No revenue yet
noRevenueYet.hint: Monthly collected revenue will chart here.

noNewPatients.title: No new patients yet
noNewPatients.hint: New registrations over the last 30 days chart here.

noVisits.title: No visits this month
noVisits.hint: Visits recorded per doctor will chart here.
